title: Lightning Strike negates opponent magic

card.rawText: Play this card from your hand when your opponent plays a magic card. Negate the magic card and then inflict 20 damage to all creatures on the field.

plan.title: Lightning Strike negates opponent magic
plan.summary: Respond to an opponent's magic card with Lightning Strike and verify the triggering magic is negated and sent to cemetery.

notes: Lightning Strike is in player_1 hand.
Player_2 plays a standard magic card with a visible effect.
This fixture covers 127-E01, the negate-and-cemetery branch; 127-E02 covers the follow-up 20 damage to all creatures.

steps: Player_2 plays the target standard magic.
Open the Lightning response window for player_1.
Player_1 plays Lightning Strike targeting the chain magic.
Resolve the chain in reverse order.

expectedAssertions.label: Opponent magic effect did not resolve

manualVerification: Confirm 127-E02 resolves the separate 20 damage to all creatures after the negation.
riskNotes: This fixture intentionally isolates the card's negation branch from the follow-up area damage branch.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Lightning Strike's magic negation branch.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
